title: The Great Expansion
description: A tech and resource progression mod focused on machines, alloys, exotic materials, and advanced crafting systems.
body:
![the great expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf730f247a9a4dc8d0b1b3c7b04aadf62168af76.png)
**⚙️❄️ The Great Expansion**  
A Massive Industrial & Exploration Adventure for Minecraft

The Great Expansion transforms your world into an ecosystem of industrial automation, advanced metallurgy, frozen wilderness survival, and ancient desert secrets.  

**Forge Your Path!**

🔩 **Advanced Machines**  
- **Crusher** – Break down raw ores into refined processing materials.  
- **Induction Furnace** – Electrified high-temperature smelting.  
- **Pressure Cooker** – High-pressure crafting and chemical processing.  
- **Refinery** – Convert crude oil into gasoline, diesel, and propane.  
- **Propane Generator** – Generate power using processed fuels.  
- **Filler, Machine Frames & Steel Frames** – Essential infrastructure for massive builds.  

⛏️ **New Ores, Metals & Materials**  
- **Bauxite** → Aluminum  
- **Cassiterite** → Tin  
- **Galena** → Lead  
- **Ilmenite** → Titanium  
- **Cinnabar** → Mercury  
- **Cryonite**, **Aqualith**, & **Permafrost Ores**  

⚔️ **Powerful Tools, Weapons & Armor**  
- **Titanium Tools & Full Armor Set**  
- **Aqualith Tools & Armor**  
- **Steel Hammer** – A heavy-duty industrial tool.  
- **Lead Arrows** – Dense and deadly ranged weapons.  

❄️ **Wild Tundra** – A Frozen Biome of Danger  
Enter the unforgiving Wild Tundra, where:  
- Snowbound effects can cripple the unprepared.  
- Sub-Zombies roam beneath the ice.  
- Cryonite and Permafrost ores await deep below.  
- Plants like Snowdrop, Hellebore, and Winterberry thrive in the frost.  

🧊 **Decorative Ice**  
- Ice Bricks & Ice Blocks  
- Stairs, Slabs, Walls, Doors, Trapdoors & Fence Gates  
- Functioning Ice Cutter for shaping frozen materials.  

🏜️ **Desert Treasures & Ancient Structures**  
- Cobblestone Pillars (Multi-Way, T-Sections & Towers)  
- Sand Vaults  
- Reinforced Chests  

🪵 **New Wood Set – Palo Tree**  
- Logs, Planks, Leaves  
- Stairs, Slabs, Fences, Fence Gates  
- Buttons, Pressure Plates & Saplings  

🧪 **Potions, Enchantments & Effects**  
- **Snowfleck Potions**  
- **Avencidor Potions**  
- **Snowbound Status Effect**  
- **Alpentall Enchantment**  
- Custom attributes like **Apalatian**  

🎵 **Atmosphere & Sound Design**  
Immerse yourself with custom music:  
- **Snowscape** – A calming frozen soundtrack.  
- **Hollow Bells** – Echoing tones of ice and mystery.  

❄️ **Winter Expansion Content**  
The Great Expansion also includes a dedicated Winter Expansion featuring:  
- Snowmen of all sizes  
- Frozen crops  
- Ice construction blocks  
- Tundra creatures  
- Permafrost & Cryonite
